introSection: Sandy's Blasting Bronco is a steel launched indoor roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe American Dream in East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA. The ride officially opened on October 1, 2020. The ride is themed to a contraption Sandy and Patrick from SpongeBob SquarePants made. The ride has a lighting package from KCL Engineering.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a Vertical LSM Coaster installation from Intamin (also referred to as IntaRide by the state of New Jersey).

fullText:
Sandy's Blasting Bronco is a steel launched indoor roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe American Dream in East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA. The ride officially opened on October 1, 2020. The ride is themed to a contraption Sandy and Patrick from SpongeBob SquarePants made. The ride has a lighting package from KCL Engineering.

The ride is a Vertical LSM Coaster installation from Intamin (also referred to as IntaRide by the state of New Jersey).
